title: TFCraft-TFRU
description: TerrafirmaCraft with huge modifies for TFRU modpack
body:
# TFC-TFRU 群峦传说-峦屿梦星群
TerraFirmaCraft for TFRU, contains huge modificaions between original 1.7.10 TFC, see game mechanics and other infos on original TFC page: https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft

峦屿梦星群整合专用的群峦传说，对原1.7.10的TFC进行了大量修改，请在原页面查看游戏机制与更多内容: https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft

## License 协议

This mod is licensed under [GNU GPL v3](https://github.com/Deadrik/TFCraft/blob/master/license.txt)

该项目遵循[GNU GPL v3](https://github.com/Deadrik/TFCraft/blob/master/license.txt)开源协议进行开源

## Attention 注意事项
This project contains plenty of changes, will break existing TFC saves and not suitable for update from standard version of TFC, please use it at your own risk.

该项目涉及大量魔改，与原有TFC存档不兼容，并非延续官方版本的更新，慎用。

## Differences 差别

The TFC World generates in Dimension 11, no longer replacing the vanilla Overworld, Nether, or End.

Kaolinite and graphite now feature indicator blocks.

Ore generation occurs more frequently.

Rock layer coverage reduced by 16 times.

Thickness of the uppermost rock layer decreased by 20 blocks (differentiating shallow and deep ore yields).

BGM modifications.

Reduced hardness of certain blocks.

Compatible with other mods providing health boosts.

Enhanced prospecting pickaxe feedback (deep exploration, direction, area coverage, etc.).

Integrated botania systems: Magicsteel Anvil, Magic Forge, etc.

Removed TFC Nether.

RecurrentComplex-TFRU compatibility (TFC-style structure generation).

Rewritten anvil and tank recipe logic

Bellows can push entities

Integrated processing recipes for GT6 items

Rewritten collapse logic (reduced frequency under same settings)

Now renders satiety; tasty foods provide more satiety, high satiety grants potion effect bonuses

Hunger mechanics compatible with vanilla hunger consumption/regeneration

Wolves attack skeletons; Creepers avoid cats

All silicite renamed to quartzite

Fixed mismatched textures/translations for smoothstone, stone walls, etc.

Halved fall damage

Added Loyalty and Penetration enchantments usable on javelins

Forging finished items with minimal steps rewards extra durability and returns some materials

Multi-layered snow

Stone particles and ore particles in the world can have snow

Iron ingots can no longer be smelted into wrought iron in furnaces

Removed hot spring water particles

Unregistered TFC items like TFC charcoal and TFC clay replaced with vanilla equivalents

### Fixed bugs:

Fixed issue where flowing TFC fluid would randomly transform into other blocks

silk touch cannot be used on ice

The End has been replaced by an invalid TFC generator

Anvil recipes are lost when switching dimensions

Memory leak related to chunk loading

Negative durability hammers do not break

fluid dupe from sluice boxes, wooden barrels, and GT tanks

Container GUI does not close when the container is destroyed

/

群峦世界在11号维度生成，不再替换原版主世界，下界和末地

高岭土和石墨有指示物

矿石生成更频繁

岩层面积降低16倍

最高一层岩石厚度降低20（区分出深浅层矿的收益）

bgm修改

降低部分方块硬度

兼容其他mod提供生命上限提升的手段

更强大的探矿镐提示（深层勘探，方向，区域等）

植物魔法集成，魔力砧，魔力锻炉等

移除群峦下界

RecurrentComplex-TFRU兼容（群峦风格的结构生成）

重写砧和储罐配方逻辑

风箱可推动实体

集成部分材质的gt6物品的群峦加工配方

重写塌方逻辑（同配置下频率降低）

现在会渲染饱和度，好吃的食物提供更多饱和度，高饱和度提供药水效果加成

饥饿度兼容原版饥饿度消耗和增加

群峦狼会攻击骷髅，苦力怕会躲避群峦猫

所有硅岩改名为石英岩

修复光滑石，石墙等材质与翻译不对应问题

减半摔落伤害

增加可用于标枪的忠诚和穿透附魔

用尽量少的步骤锻造出成品时奖励额外耐久度和返还部分材料

多层雪

世界上的石粒矿粒等物品可以落雪

铁方坯不再能在木炭炉中融化成锻铁

删除温泉水粒子

取消注册TFC木炭，TFC粘土等物品，并改用原版的对应物品


### 修复bug:

流动的群峦流体变成随机的其他方块的问题

精准采集无法用于群峦冰

末地被无效的TFC生成器替换

铁砧配方在维度切换时丢失

区块加载相关的内存泄漏

负耐久锤子不会损坏

洗矿槽，木桶和gt储罐刷流体

容器被破坏的时候容器GUI不关闭
